title: IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES - 211info
text: RISE, INC IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home services that support people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD). Services include: behavior support, hourly caregiving, and case coordination. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Children and adults with I/DD, mental health diagnoses, and backgrounds of abuse and neglect, and their families. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 371-3001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 371-3001 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information or for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Albany, Bend, Cottage Grove, Eugene, La Grande, Pendleton, Roseburg, and Salem Services: Adult In Home Respite Care Children's In Home Respite Care Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RISE, INC
